name: Fudgy Bonbons -- Tyndall
recipeIngredient: 60 Milk chocolate candy kisses or white-and-chocolaty candy kisses
2 oz White baking bar or vanilla-flavored baking bar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine the chocolate chips and butter. Cook over low heat until melted and smooth.
3. Add the sweetened condensed milk; mix well until combined.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, chopped nuts (if using), chocolate mixture, and vanilla extract. Mix until well incorporated.
5. Scoop about 1 tablespoon of dough around each candy kiss, ensuring it is completely covered. Place them on ungreased cookie sheets, spacing them about an inch apart.
6. Bake for 6 to 8 minutes in the preheated oven. The cookies will be soft and shiny but become firmer once cooled; avoid overbaking. Remove from the cookie sheets.
7. In a small saucepan, melt the white baking bar (or vanilla-flavored baking bar) with shortening over low heat until smooth. Drizzle over the baked cookies.
8. Allow to cool before storing in a tightly covered container. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
